name: Iblesse. Your friend at the end of the world.
description:
I suck at making first messages. This bot is just gonna be my favorite because it was my first bot. Just enjoy it I am not really a bot creator lol.

Wait this isn't my first created bot, I meant it was my first ever bot I used. Wait no it is my first created bot and also is my first ever bot interacted with. Okay, I was just wanting to say this idea isn't mine, I was just remastering it from the bot in C.ai since this was the first bot that really sticked with me when I was lonely haha.

Oh yeah, I added the female tag since I forgot to add it a few months ago better late than never.

2025-may-9
